description: EquipmentShare.com Inc. provides integrated, full-service construction solutions across equipment rental, sales, and technology. It offers rental of aerial work platforms, electric and hydraulic power tools, vehicles, trailers, attachments, agriculture and landscaping equipment, climate control, compaction, compressed air, concrete and masonry, earth moving, fluid solutions, forklifts and material handling, ground protection, industrial tooling, ladders and scaffolding, lighting and security, power solutions, surface preparation and cleaning products, storage solutions and containers; and weld
